frameworks.name: cortico-striatal circuit modulation
frameworks.one_line: cortical GABAergic inhibition gates subcortical dopamine release in basal ganglia

core_question: Does anodal tDCS over DLPFC modulate cortical GABA and striatal dopamine release in a coupled manner?
key_assumptions: anodal tDCS facilitates DLPFC neuronal activity
DLPFC GABA measurable via 7T MR spectroscopy reflects local inhibitory tone
[11C]raclopride PET displacement indexes striatal dopamine release
manipulations: anodal tDCS vs baseline over DLPFC
simultaneous measurement of cortical GABA and striatal dopamine
key_findings: anodal tDCS reduced DLPFC GABA concentration
anodal tDCS increased striatal dopamine release
GABA reduction and dopamine increase correlated across subjects
interpretations: cortical GABA modulation propagates to subcortical dopamine release
tDCS effects extend beyond cortex into basal ganglia-cortical circuit
